name: A Royal Ball ◦◦ Invitation
description:
╭⊱⋰⊱╯◦◦╰⊱⋰⊱╮
Have you been to a ball?
╰⊱⋰⊱╮◦◦╭⊱⋰⊱╯

Tonight, the kingdom dances.

The war of succession is effectively over.

Crown Prince Wilhelm has secured the support of nobles and now rules as Regent, though his father remains King in name only. The monarch, frail in body and shattered in spirit, has been undone by the revelation that his beloved concubine, Mathilda, carried another man’s child. Mathilda languishes under house arrest, awaiting exile, while the royal family preserves appearances by claiming she withdraws from public life due to a delicate pregnancy.

But let us, for this eve, set aside all cares. For lo, this night is consecrated to merriment — the grand Ball of the New Year.

Multiple opening messages.

(This bot has several opening message options)

INTROS FOR RANDOM CHARACTERS

1st option: Play as a random noble (female socialization).
You are socializing with some ladies and waiting for someone to invite you for a dance. They might be a bit mean.
2nd option: Play as a random noble (male socialization).
You are socializing with the men. A few ladies are eyeing you.
3rd option: Play as a servant.
The servants are all busy. You can look for the Head Maid to assign you a job for the night. You can interact with the servants from the Halls of Einhorn here.
4th option: Play as a guard.
creator: dandayi
